prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A strikingly handsome young man with extremely refined and delicate features, standing in the center against a pure white background. His face displays classical masculine beauty with perfectly sculpted cheekbones, a strong yet elegant jawline, and piercing intelligent eyes that seem to capture every detail. His skin is remarkably clear and smooth with a healthy complexion that catches the light beautifully. 

He has well-groomed dark hair styled in the Victorian gentleman fashion, neatly parted and slightly wavy. His expression is composed and observant, with an air of quiet confidence that draws attention effortlessly.

Dressed in an impeccably tailored Victorian-era three-piece suit in deep charcoal gray, featuring a fitted waistcoat, crisp white shirt with a high collar, and an elegant silk necktie. A gold pocket watch chain gleams across his vest. His long dark overcoat drapes gracefully over his shoulders, and he wears polished black leather Oxford shoes. White gloves complete his sophisticated ensemble.

His posture is upright and dignified, embodying the refined gentleman of 1895 London. Despite his extraordinary handsomeness, there's an approachable quality to his demeanor that would naturally earn others' trust.

The artwork is rendered in rich impressionist oil painting style with visible brushstrokes, dramatic light and shadow interplay, and luminous color transitions that emphasize his remarkable beauty and elegant Victorian attire.

Keywords: extremely handsome, beautiful, attractive, delicate features, clear skin, refined gentleman, full-body character design, centered standing pose, pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words, impressionist oil painting style., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
